channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 🦀 therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST (757 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: therealaleph

📝 Repository: therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST

📄 Descrizione: Rust port of @masterking32's MasterHttpRelayVPN — all credit to @masterking32 for the original idea and Python implementation. Free DPI bypass via a Google Apps Script relay with TLS SNI concealment. CLI + cross-platform desktop UI, HTTP + SOCKS5 proxy, no runtime deps.

⭐ Stelle: 757

🍴 Forks: 87

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: anti-censorship censorship-circumvention cross-platform desktop-app domain-fronting dpi-bypass egui google-apps-script gui http-proxy iran mitm proxy rust sni socks5 tls

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-21T14:46:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-27T05:12:14Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 ctkqiang/nezha_cyber (13 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ctkqiang

📝 Repository: ctkqiang/nezha_cyber

📄 Descrizione: 哪吒网络安全是一款高性能终端 UI (TUI) 应用，专为从事红队演练、渗透测试和漏洞研究的网络安全专业人员打造。本应用作为智能指挥控制界面，利用 DeepSeek 大语言模型提供实时流式对话、基于函数调用 (Function Calling) 的自动化工具编排，以及多智能体会话管理——这一切均在轻量级终端环境中完成。 核心设计哲学：采用 Elm Architecture (Model-Update-View) 模式，纯函数状态转换，通过 tokio::sync::mpsc 通道传递事件，遵循零成本抽象的 Rust 惯用模式。
